title: BackTools
description: Renders the last used tool in player's back
body:
# BackTools
Backtools is a client-side Fabric mod that renders the last used tool in player's back and other clients are able to see it. 
You can change any orientation or disable any tool in the config file.

## Showcase
Click below to watch the video

[![Alt text](https://img.youtube.com/vi/HWKFNK9IBn4/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HWKFNK9IBn4)
